---
title: "My workout data"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme:
      light: [litera, custom.scss]
      dark: [darkly, custom.scss]
    scrolling: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="icon" href="favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;500&family=Inter:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: envelope
        href: mailto:teromeh@proton.me
      - icon: house-door
        href: ../
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

data <- readRDS("workout-history.rds")

title_font <- list(family = "Outfit, sans-serif", size = 14, color = "#1a1a1a")

activity_counts <- data |>
  count(activity_type, name = "maara") |>
  mutate(percentage = round(maara / sum(maara) * 100, 0),
         display_label = paste0("<b>", activity_type, "<br>", percentage, "%</b>"))

distance_counts <- data |>
  count(distance_class, name = "maara") |>
  mutate(percentage = round(maara / sum(maara) * 100, 0),
         display_label = paste0("<b>", distance_class, "<br>", percentage, "%</b>"))

monthly_distance <- data |>
  mutate(month = floor_date(workout_date, "month")) |>
  group_by(month, activity_type) |>
  summarise(total_km = round(sum(distance_km, na.rm = TRUE), 0), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(month) |>
  mutate(month_label = paste0(month.abb[as.integer(format(month, "%m"))], " ", format(month, "%Y")))

years <- c("All", sort(unique(format(data$workout_date, "%Y")), decreasing = TRUE))

activity_colors <- c("Walk" = "#2E2E2E", "Run" = "#D81B60")

activity_by_year <- lapply(years, function(yr) {
  d <- if (yr == "All") data else data |> filter(format(workout_date, "%Y") == yr)
  d |> count(activity_type, name = "maara") |>
    mutate(percentage = round(maara / sum(maara) * 100, 0),
           color = activity_colors[activity_type])
})

distance_colors <- c("0-5 km" = "#00BCD4", "5-10 km" = "#0097A7", 
                      "10-15 km" = "#D81B60", "15+ km" = "#AD1457")

distance_by_year <- lapply(years, function(yr) {
  d <- if (yr == "All") data else data |> filter(format(workout_date, "%Y") == yr)
  d |> count(distance_class, name = "maara") |>
    mutate(percentage = round(maara / sum(maara) * 100, 0),
           color = distance_colors[distance_class])
})
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: activity-types
initial <- activity_by_year[[1]]

buttons <- lapply(seq_along(years), function(i) {
  d <- activity_by_year[[i]]
  list(
    method = "update",
    args = list(
      list(
        labels = list(I(d$activity_type)),
        values = list(I(d$maara)),
        text = list(I(paste0("<b>", d$percentage, "%</b>"))),
        hovertext = list(I(paste0(d$activity_type, ": ", d$maara, " workouts"))),
        marker = list(list(colors = I(d$color)))
      )
    ),
    label = years[i]
  )
})

plot_ly(
  labels = initial$activity_type,
  values = initial$maara,
  type = "pie",
  hole = 0.6,
  marker = list(colors = initial$color),
  text = paste0("<b>", initial$percentage, "%</b>"),
  textinfo = "text",
  textfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 16, color = "#ffffff"),
  hovertext = paste0(initial$activity_type, ": ", initial$maara, " workouts"),
  hoverinfo = "text"
) |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Activity Types</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    updatemenus = list(list(
      type = "dropdown",
      buttons = buttons,
      x = 1,
      y = 1.2,
      xanchor = "right",
      font = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 12)
    )),
    showlegend = TRUE,
    legend = list(
      orientation = "v",
      x = 0,
      y = 0.85,
      xanchor = "left",
      font = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13),
      title = list(text = "<b>Activity</b>", font = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13))
    ),
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white"
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column

```{r}
#| label: distance-classes
initial_d <- distance_by_year[[1]]

buttons_d <- lapply(seq_along(years), function(i) {
  d <- distance_by_year[[i]]
  list(
    method = "update",
    args = list(
      list(
        labels = list(I(d$distance_class)),
        values = list(I(d$maara)),
        text = list(I(paste0("<b>", d$percentage, "%</b>"))),
        hovertext = list(I(paste0(d$distance_class, ": ", d$maara, " workouts"))),
        marker = list(list(colors = I(d$color)))
      )
    ),
    label = years[i]
  )
})

plot_ly(
  labels = initial_d$distance_class,
  values = initial_d$maara,
  type = "pie",
  hole = 0.6,
  marker = list(colors = initial_d$color),
  text = paste0("<b>", initial_d$percentage, "%</b>"),
  textinfo = "text",
  textfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 16, color = "#ffffff"),
  hovertext = paste0(initial_d$distance_class, ": ", initial_d$maara, " workouts"),
  hoverinfo = "text"
) |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Distance Distribution</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    updatemenus = list(list(
      type = "dropdown",
      buttons = buttons_d,
      x = 1,
      y = 1.2,
      xanchor = "right",
      font = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 12)
    )),
    showlegend = TRUE,
    legend = list(
      orientation = "v",
      x = 0,
      y = 0.85,
      xanchor = "left",
      font = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13),
      title = list(text = "<b>Distance</b>", font = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13))
    ),
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white"
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: distance-over-time
walk_data <- monthly_distance |> filter(activity_type == "Walk")
run_data <- monthly_distance |> filter(activity_type == "Run")

plot_ly() |>
  add_trace(
    data = walk_data,
    x = ~month,
    y = ~total_km,
    type = "bar",
    name = "Walk",
    marker = list(color = "#2E2E2E"),
    hovertext = ~paste0(month_label, " - Walk: ", total_km, " km"),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data = run_data,
    x = ~month,
    y = ~total_km,
    type = "bar",
    name = "Run",
    marker = list(color = "#D81B60"),
    hovertext = ~paste0(month_label, " - Run: ", total_km, " km"),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) |>
  layout(
    barmode = "stack",
    title = list(text = "<b>Distance by Month (km)</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = TRUE,
    legend = list(font = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)),
    dragmode = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    xaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, zeroline = FALSE,
                 type = "date",
                 tickformat = "%b %Y",
                 tickfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 12),
                 tickangle = -45),
    yaxis = list(title = "", showgrid = FALSE, showline = FALSE,
                 zeroline = FALSE, tickfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white"
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```
